_meta.description: own#1 doc-english-required — legacy CJK-containing .md files grandfathered at HARD promotion (2026-04-24).
_meta.policy: FROZEN, SHRINK-ONLY. New .md files under own#1 decl scope (domains/, theory/, reports/, experiments/, papers/, bridge/, n6shared/, proposals/) and CONTRIBUTING.md must be English-only (CJK density 0%). Entries may be REMOVED upon translation but never ADDED. Long-term goal: shrink to zero via Korean-to-English migration.
_meta.directive: user 'hard go' — promote own#1 from SOFT log to HARD block

history.details: Added proposals/ to OWN1_SCOPE_DIRS and CONTRIBUTING.md to OWN1_ROOT_DOCS. 9 CJK-containing proposals/*.md grandfathered into the allowlist (1050 -> 1059) — including the own1-hard-english-only-translation-roadmap-2026-04-24.md proposal co-landed by the parallel roadmap agent. Allowlist policy hardened to FROZEN, SHRINK-ONLY (no new grandfather).
